name: TestWaitForChange
title: TestWaitForChange
description: Waits for the next change of a valueHandle. This is equivalent to calling TestWaitForChangeCountGreater (value, value.GetChangeCount(), timeoutMs).

Note that only changes which occur while the function waits are considered. If you want to wait for changes which may occur earlier, or if you want to wait for several changes, use TestWaitForChangeFlag or TestWaitForChangeCountGreater.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value handle of a communication object or distributed object.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
